---
name: Report a dead link
about: A listed entry is broken, the repo got archived, or the site moved
title: "Dead link: "
labels: dead-link
---

**Entry**: <!-- [Name](https://…) -->

**What happened?** <!-- e.g. 404, domain for sale, repo archived on GitHub, domain redirects elsewhere -->

**Seen how often?** <!-- first report / consistent for N days / intermittent -->

---

_FYI: the weekly enrichment workflow already tracks `link_status` and moves entries to the graveyard after 90 days of non-2xx responses. This issue is for faster manual action — removing entries outright, or flagging something the bot missed._
